problem:
invoke(version="v2") returns list[StreamPart] instead of GraphOutput when stream_mode != "values" — polymorphic return type undocumented. When using invoke(version="v2"), the return type changes depending on stream_mode.

- stream_mode="values" returns GraphOutput with .value and .interrupts
- stream_mode="updates" returns raw list[StreamPart]

Interrupts are still present in the streamed chunks, but the GraphOutput abstraction is bypassed entirely.

This behavior is reproducible with both:
- ca
expected_solution_keywords: invoke(version="v2") returns list[StreamPart] instead of GraphOutput when stream_mode != "values" — polymorphic return type undocumented
